name: winplate
description: A floating Windows status plate built with Electron.

scripts.check: node --check src/main/main.js && node --check src/main/codexUsage.js && node --check src/main/pythonService.js && node --check src/main/windows.js && node --check src/main/tray.js && node --check src/preload/preload.js && node --check src/renderer/app.js && node --check src/shared/mockStatus.js && node --test src/main/codexUsage.test.js src/renderer/security.test.js
